---
title: "Flat Klein Bottles"
author: "Stepan Paul"
date: "2026-04-06"
description: "Geometry and Topology Preserving Realizations of the Flat Klein Bottle"
image: "paper-kb.jpeg"
image-alt: "An origami Klein Bottle"
categories: Illustration, Research
---

![A curved-crease origami model of piecewise-smooth path isometric image of a flat Klein bottle ([Bridges paper](https://archive.bridgesmathart.org/2021/bridges2021-47.html#gsc.tab=0)).](cyl-flat-kb.jpg){width=50%}

![An origami model of a piecewise linear locally isometric immersion of a flat Klein bottle ([arXiv paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.08826)).](paper-kb.jpeg){width=50%}

I have done work on finding realizations of the flat Klein bottle in Euclidean 3-space, and I find it important to make physical sculptures illustrating the objects I've discovered.

- [Project page](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1uM5zznTzRmvuM-YX50dSFJHQ7Z5HQsvEkY3Zk_sJLLk/edit?usp=sharing)
